evidence_phrases: Micron set new records across revenue, gross margin, EPS, and free cash flow in fiscal Q2
we expect significant records again in fiscal Q3
memory has become a strategic asset for our customers
approximations: Operating expenses: Approximately $1.60 billion (GAAP) / Approximately $1.40 billion (Non-GAAP)
qualitative_signals.ceo_quote_primary: Micron set new records across revenue, gross margin, EPS, and free cash flow in fiscal Q2, driven by a strong demand environment, tight industry supply, and our strong execution, and we expect significant records again in fiscal Q3
